conceptClusters.title: Retrieved syntax project and research
exitEvidence: Learner retrieves start-tag attribute grammar, parser recovery, portable project trees, and evidence-driven query refinement before complete-document work.
Learner keeps prior source, project, and research evidence active in every document-loading task.

conceptClusters.title: Document mode and envelope
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes doctype node, rendering mode, document element, metadata head, titled document, and content body.
Learner authors a complete portable document from an empty file without hidden scaffold source.

conceptClusters.title: Language encoding and title
exitEvidence: Learner declares primary and bounded changed language scopes and distinguishes language tagging from translation.
Learner preserves non-ASCII text through UTF-8 save, reload, parse, and copy and keeps document title distinct from visible heading.

conceptClusters.title: Discovery and viewport metadata
exitEvidence: Learner authors truthful unique description, canonical, icon, and bounded sharing metadata with named consumers and limits.
Learner configures safe layout viewport without restricting zoom or claiming metadata fixes rigid layout.

conceptClusters.title: Paths requests and rendering
exitEvidence: Learner resolves relative, root-relative, absolute, and fragment references from correct document or base URL and repairs changed paths.
Learner traces URL resolution, requests, responses, discovery, parse, DOM, CSS matching, layout, paint, and interactive output without collapsing layers.

conceptClusters.title: Authority and verification
exitEvidence: Learner turns a changed HTML question into a bounded claim and locates current specification or official documentation evidence.
Learner resolves conflicting evidence through version, normative status, browser observation, test limits, and remaining uncertainty.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked fragment becomes a complete multilingual portable document while document mode, metadata, paths, requests, DOM, layout, paint, and technical authority remain observable.
activityDesigns.startingState: A valid body fragment, empty portable project, deterministic browser pipeline, metadata inspectors, viewport simulator, URL resolver, and research notebook are synchronized.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner predicts and explains twenty document-loading contrasts without boilerplate myths, machine paths, ranking guarantees, zoom restrictions, or authority overclaims.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts prediction with source grammar, parser mode, document tree, title, accessibility language, byte decoding, metadata consumer, viewport, URL, request, render, and authority evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one pipeline boundary after prediction and preserves earlier attribute, recovery, project, and query reasoning.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss returns to a smaller contrasting document, requires a revised prediction, and tests a changed path, metadata value, response, or authority source.

interactions.title: Retrieve attribute grammar
interactions.learnerAction: Predict parsed owner, name, value, and recovery for valid and malformed metadata attributes before document construction.
interactions.artifactChange: Four start-tag cases are predicted.

evidence.observable: Attribute grammar and recovery predictions match parsed properties and errors.
evidence.changedCase: Quote and separator defects move to different metadata.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Metadata attribute treated as free text outside start tag.
interactions.correctionRoute: Tokenize one owner-name-value sequence.

interactions.title: Retrieve project and query evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect project root, current document path, candidate URL references, initial query, opened authority, version, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: Prior project and research evidence is labeled.

evidence.observable: Paths derive from document location and claims derive from opened current authority.
evidence.changedCase: Document moves and authority version changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Project root or first result assumed universal base.
interactions.correctionRoute: Resolve path and claim from explicit context.

interactions.title: Predict doctype mode
interactions.learnerAction: Predict doctype node, document element, rendering mode, and visible content with correct, missing, and malformed doctypes.
interactions.artifactChange: Three document beginnings are parsed side by side.

evidence.observable: Prediction distinguishes doctype from element and version download and identifies mode evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Whitespace and comments precede doctype in changed document.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Doctype called root element or HTML version selector.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect document node types and compatibility mode.

interactions.title: Inspect complete document envelope

interactions.artifactChange: A complete worked document is annotated.

evidence.observable: Source, DOM, title, and body evidence distinguish every envelope part.
evidence.changedCase: Head and body source tokens are misplaced and recovered.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered body fragment treated as complete portable document.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map source ranges to document tree and consumers.

interactions.title: Predict language scopes

interactions.artifactChange: Primary and inline language attributes join comparison document.

evidence.observable: Valid tags and DOM and accessibility scopes match intended human languages.
evidence.changedCase: Primary and inline languages change independently.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Lang attribute expected to translate visible words.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate text content from language metadata.

interactions.title: Trace UTF-8 round trip
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect bytes, early encoding declaration, decoded characters, DOM text, rendered glyph selection, save, reload, and copy evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Non-ASCII place names join document and round-trip.

evidence.observable: Bytes, decoding, characters, font glyphs, and copied text remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: New script and emoji content replace original text.

interactions.correctionRoute: Trace bytes through decoding before font rendering.

interactions.title: Contrast title and heading

evidence.observable: Document title consumers remain separate from body heading semantics.
evidence.changedCase: Second page receives distinct title and same site heading.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Title element expected to create visible largest heading.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect head consumer and body DOM separately.

evidence.observable: Every layer maps to distinct source, DOM, accessibility, browser, or rendering evidence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Translation, encoding, font, title, and heading conflated.
interactions.correctionRoute: Point to one consumer or transformation per layer.

interactions.title: Inspect truthful discovery metadata

evidence.observable: Values match visible content, identity, inspectable outputs, and explicit limitations.
evidence.changedCase: Second page and sharing consumer change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Keywords or metadata promised ranking or hidden content.

interactions.title: Predict duplicate metadata fallout

evidence.changedCase: Page purpose and canonical URL change.

interactions.title: Predict safe viewport behavior

interactions.feedbackTarget: Viewport metadata called automatic responsive layout.

interactions.title: Explain metadata limits

evidence.observable: Explanation maps each value to consumer, evidence, limitation, and changed behavior.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Metadata described as invisible magic that guarantees outcomes.

interactions.title: Resolve URL reference types

evidence.observable: Every target follows correct base and URL algorithm without machine path.
evidence.changedCase: Document moves and base URL changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All relative paths resolved from project root.

interactions.title: Inspect path failure evidence

evidence.observable: Diagnosis isolates exact resolution or response failure.
evidence.changedCase: Failure changes from case mismatch to encoded segment.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Missing resource blamed on parser or browser generally.

interactions.title: Predict loading pipeline
interactions.learnerAction: Predict navigation URL resolution, document request, response, parsing, DOM, resource discovery, CSS matching, layout, paint, and interactive output.

evidence.observable: Each source, network, parse, style, layout, paint, and output stage remains distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Subresource request fails while document succeeds.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser assumed to read every project file automatically.
interactions.correctionRoute: Follow only referenced and discovered resources.

interactions.title: Inspect missing-resource stage
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect source reference, resolved URL, request, response, DOM, computed style, layout, paint, and visible output to locate failure.
interactions.artifactChange: A missing resource is traced without guessed repair.

evidence.observable: Failure is located at exact URL, request, response, parse, match, or render stage.
evidence.changedCase: Resource loads but CSS selector no longer matches.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible absence treated as proof of missing file.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect each pipeline boundary in order.

interactions.title: Explain source to pixels
interactions.learnerAction: Explain one document from saved source through URL, response bytes, decoding, parse, DOM, matching, layout, paint, and interaction.
interactions.artifactChange: A source-to-output explanation is recorded.

evidence.observable: Every stage names its input, output, evidence, and failure limit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Source, DOM, and rendered page collapsed into one thing.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace one changed character or resource across stages.

interactions.title: Frame bounded HTML claim
interactions.learnerAction: Turn a document or loading question into claim, scope, version, context, authority need, behavior test, and uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded claim and query plan are recorded.

evidence.observable: Claim is testable and routes to current specification or official documentation.
evidence.changedCase: Browser version and question scope change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad question or generated answer treated as authority.
interactions.correctionRoute: Narrow mechanism, environment, and evidence need.

interactions.title: Compare technical authorities
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect specification, official vendor docs, stale blog, copied answer, generated claim, browser test, version, normative status, and limitation.
interactions.artifactChange: Six evidence roles receive claim-specific labels.

evidence.observable: Current normative and official sources and behavior tests have bounded roles.
evidence.changedCase: Stale official page conflicts with current specification.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First result or working code accepted as normative truth.
interactions.correctionRoute: Resolve version, status, scope, and observation separately.

interactions.title: Explain verified document decision
interactions.learnerAction: Explain claim, authority, version, normative status, context, browser observation, contradiction, limitation, and remaining uncertainty.
interactions.artifactChange: A complete claim-evidence-limit-test record is saved.

evidence.observable: Decision is reproducible, current, scoped, tested, and honest about uncertainty.
evidence.changedCase: Authority updates and observed browser behavior changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Conclusion lacks source role, version, test, or limit.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild record from bounded claim outward.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A cooling-center fragment becomes a complete portable multi-page directory with truthful metadata, safe viewport, working URLs, observable request-to-render evidence, and source-backed decisions.
activityDesigns.startingState: A valid cooling-center body fragment, portable project root, deterministic browser pipeline, metadata and viewport inspectors, URL resolver, and authority notebook are available.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved directory survives reload, non-ASCII and language changes, multi-page metadata variation, viewport changes, document and asset moves, request faults, parser recovery, and authority refresh.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports observed source grammar, parser mode, tree, language, bytes, title, metadata consumer, viewport, URL, request, render, authority, and retained-skill evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Three progressive hints move from controlling relationship, to evidence surface, to smaller unrelated example without supplying final document or path.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed checkpoint routes to a smaller document contrast, a revised prediction, and a changed cooling-center case before continuation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A regional-office fragment becomes an independently completed multi-page document set as syntax, envelope, metadata, viewport, URL, loading, and authority support fades.
activityDesigns.startingState: A saved body fragment, partial project tree, incomplete metadata brief, browser pipeline, and research notebook are provided without a final document scaffold.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner completes, mutates, reloads, verifies, and explains the regional directory without copying cooling-center source, paths, metadata, or requirement order.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names observed layer and unmet concept but withholds final envelope, metadata values, project tree, paths, diagnosis, and authority decision.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints fade from evidence-surface cues to learner-requested concept reminders and unrelated mini-documents.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires smaller parallel evidence, minimal repair, and changed regional-office case before original checkpoint reopens.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A missing-resource incident is diagnosed across source, project, URL, request, response, decode, parse, DOM, metadata, viewport, match, layout, paint, authority, and revision evidence.

activityDesigns.hintContract: On-request hints point to evidence stage, then contract, then unrelated mini-incident; final paths and source remain hidden.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Each repair must reproduce original fault and survive a different document, path, response, metadata, or browser mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently built multipage mutual-aid resource network with complete documents, portable URLs, truthful metadata, request traces, and authority evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: A stakeholder brief, raw content, public URL rules, asset manifest, and empty project directory are provided without a document scaffold.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved and reloaded site passes document, language, encoding, metadata, viewport, URL, loading-pipeline, research, and changed-case checks.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names the failed observable and affected consumer or pipeline stage without supplying learner code or the final document structure.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints are available only on request and move from evidence location to a smaller parallel case before any syntax cue.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires causal diagnosis, minimal repair, and a changed resource-network case before the failed checkpoint reopens.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A spaced retrieval release review for an emergency-hosting site, including repaired documents, consumer checks, loading traces, research evidence, and changed cases.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unseen release candidate, mixed evidence cards, delayed retrieval prompts, and controlled faults are provided without access to earlier completed artifacts.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner retrieves all fourteen concepts, corrects every fault, explains causal boundaries, and passes mixed and changed release cases.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports the failed concept, observable, or causal boundary only after commitment and never reveals a complete answer or copied prior artifact.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Retrieval prompts offer optional evidence-location hints and smaller parallel cases but never reveal the release fix.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to one concept-sized correction and a changed emergency-hosting item before the mixed retrieval checkpoint reopens.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, metadata, privacy, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.
Learner-facing copy, starter documents, deterministic request traces, canonical answers, executable checks, authentic browser verification, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
